description_long: This house features a single-story rectangular layout with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows allowing ample natural light into the main living spaces. The front facade includes a prominent glass section, likely serving as the main living or dining area, and a visible entry door. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions for bedrooms, a kitchen, and a bathroom, as well as built-in shelving and cabinetry. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass and wood accents. The overall design is functional and compact, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The layout is open and functional, with visible living, kitchen, and bedroom areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, the main entry door, and an open living area with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting smaller windows, a solid wall, and the back of the kitchen and bedroom areas.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the house, a large window, and the transition between living and private spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the main entry door, a window, and a clear view of the house's rectangular footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flat overhang, and large adjacent glass window
